parse.title: Template:Energized info
parse.wikitext:
{{<includeonly>1</includeonly><noinclude>void</noinclude>|1=
* Each [[basic attack]] [[on-attack]] generates 6 ''Energize'' stacks while 1 is generated for every 24 in-game units traveled. This includes but is not limited to normal or special forms of movement, using {{tip|dash|dashes}} or {{tip|blink|blinks}}, or being {{tip|airborne|displaced}} to another location.
** Hitting abilities that apply [[on-hit]] effects will also generate 6 stacks.
* Effect applies as a separate {{tip|cast instance}}.
}}<noinclude>{{doc}}</noinclude>
